reforms.description: The Icelandic government passed a bill in May 2016 to support innovation, which included new tax incentives for individuals investing in growing innovative companies and an increase in existing R&D tax support.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The reform encourages private investment in innovation, which can enhance productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: A bill was passed in May 2016 supporting innovation.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant policy shift aimed at enhancing innovation through financial incentives, which is crucial for long-term economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: A bill was passed in May 2016 supporting innovation. Measures included new tax incentives to individuals investing in growing innovative companies.
